title: Retail Express by Maropost Connection Specification

base_url.description: Retail Express account base URL, e.g. https://<account>.retailexpress.com.au/api/v2. Legacy derives this from a bare `account` config alias when base_url is unset; this bundle requires the full base_url instead (see docs.md Known limits).

access_token.description: OAuth-style access token, sent as a Bearer token. Takes priority over api_key when both are configured, matching legacy's access-token-first precedence. Never logged.

api_key.description: API key, sent as the X-API-Key header. Used only when access_token is not configured. Never logged.

updated_after.description: Optional updated-after filter applied to every stream's request, matching legacy's config-driven query filter.

created_after.description: Optional created-after filter applied to every stream's request.

store_id.description: Optional store ID filter applied to every stream's request.

status.description: Optional status filter applied to every stream's request.
